zh.lifeSummary: 當Generys ferch Madog於1326年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾卡素時，她的父親Madog ap Gronwy34歲，母親Marged ferch Robert22歲。她於大約1346年與Ienaf ap Adda在英國威爾斯安格萊結婚。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Generys ferch Madog于1326年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾卡素时，她的父亲Madog ap Gronwy34岁，母亲Marged ferch Robert22岁。她于大约1346年与Ienaf ap Adda在英国威尔斯安格萊结婚。

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Madore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Eusebe, Fernand, Lucien, Normand, Adhemar, Adrien, Donat, Elzear, Francois, Gaetan, Gilles.
French Canadian: from a French shortened form of the Spanish personal name Amador, from Latin Amator (from amator ‘lover’), a Christian saint's name. Compare Mador .
In some cases possibly also Breton (Madoré): nickname meaning literally ‘good help’, from Old Breton mat ‘good’ and uuoret ‘help’.

nameMeanings.name: Generys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gennery
meanings: English: see January . Gennery and Jennery correspond to post-medieval dialect forms of January (see OED ). See also Genever .

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Generys ferch Madog was born in 1326, in Penrhyn Castle, Caernarfonshire, Wales, her father, Madog ap Gronwy, was 34 and her mother, Marged ferch Robert, was 22. She married Ienaf ap Adda about 1346, in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.Nant, Prestatyn, Flintshire, Wales: Prestatyn, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Generys ferch Madog est née en 1326, à Penrhyn Castle, Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, Madog ap Gronwy, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Marged ferch Robert, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Ienaf ap Adda environ 1346, à Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Generys ferch Madog 1326 in Penrhyn Castle, Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Madog ap Gronwy 34 und ihre Mutter Marged ferch Robert 22. Sie hat um 1346 in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom Ienaf ap Adda geheiratet.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Generys ferch Madog è nata il nel 1326 nel Penrhyn Castle, Caernarfonshire, Galles, sua padre, Madog ap Gronwy, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Marged ferch Robert, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Ienaf ap Adda circa 1346, nel Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Generys ferch Madogが1326年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアペンルhイン カストルで生まれた時，父Madog ap Gronwyは34歳，母Marged ferch Robertは22歳であった。約1346年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイでIenaf ap Addaと結婚した。

ko.lifeSummary: Generys ferch Madog(이)가 1326년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 펜히 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Madog ap Gronwy(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marged ferch Robert(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1346년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시에서 Ienaf ap Adda(와)과 결혼했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Generys ferch Madog nasceu em 1326, em Penrhyn Castle, Caernarfonshire, Gales, seu pai, Madog ap Gronwy, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Marged ferch Robert, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Ienaf ap Adda aproximadamente 1346, em Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Generys ferch Madog родилась в 1326 г. в местности пенрин кастл, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Madog ap Gronwy было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Marged ferch Robert, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ienaf ap Adda около 1346 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Generys ferch Madog nació en 1326, en Penrhyn Castle, Caernarfonshire, Gales, su papá, Madog ap Gronwy, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Marged ferch Robert, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Ienaf ap Adda aproximadamente 1346, en Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido.
